description: The entity evaluates security events to determine whether they could or have resulted in a failure of the entity to meet its objectives (security incidents) and, if so, takes actions to prevent or address such failures.

subcriteria.name: incident_response_plan
subcriteria.reference_text: Incident response plan documented with severity levels such as P1 through P4, escalation matrix with names and roles, and SLA targets per severity tier. Plan covers triage, classification, containment, and communication procedures.

subcriteria.name: incident_triage
subcriteria.reference_text: Security events triaged by the on-call engineer or security team. Events classified by severity and impact. Incidents tracked in ticketing system like Jira, PagerDuty, or ServiceNow from detection through resolution. Corrective actions documented.

subcriteria.name: incident_analysis
subcriteria.reference_text: Root cause analysis performed for security incidents. Post-mortem or after-action report documents what happened, systems affected, root cause, and corrective actions. Lessons learned incorporated into procedures.

mismatch_signals.reason: Vulnerability management is CC7.1, not security event evaluation.
Access management is CC6.x, not incident triage.
